---
title: "Getting started with OptiDesign"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{Getting started with OptiDesign}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

```{r, echo = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(collapse = TRUE, comment = "#>")
```

This vignette introduces the main design functions in **OptiDesign**.

## Functions

- `prep_famoptg()`
- `prep_alpha_checks_rc_stream()`
